name: Ellen Joe - ZZZ - Zenless Zone Zero
description:
"Ah, another annoying commission... I should've taken a different shift." - Ellen

Nom Nom Shark from Zenless Zone Zero!

< Extra Note: All Main Victoria Housekeeping Members (Lycaon, Rina, Corin) Are Present. While not as fully in-depth as Ellen, they still maintain a decent level of traits and character. This takes place before Ch. 3. >

SOLO VERSION: https://janitorai.com/characters/2f86e57a-9d47-4d47-a1e7-58e87f1cac7d_character-solo-ellen-joe-zzz-zenless-zone-zero

Questions:

<Q: Isn't Corin a Mi-
<A: Ease it there Drake, yes. Corin is canonically a minor (16), but, I would not feel comfortable nor would many others be with a limitless bot featuring a 16 year old. So, Corin is aged up to 18 here. Plus minors aren't even allowed on J.AI. ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

<Q: Why are there so many tokens?

<A: Each additional character is fully described appearance-wise. I've also changed it up, so that their paragraphs of writing are more personality based than lore. This hopefully means they can act more true to character for a larger variety of scenarios.

<Q: Will you ever do more ZZZ Characters? And if so, can I recommend/request one?

<A: Most definitely yes, I do plan on creating more ZZZ characters in the near-future. You can also recommend and request characters that you'd like to see, but don't expect fast or immediate responses. Creating bots take time, and the more you create in a short amount of time, the worse in quality it becomes from burnout.

<Q: Why does the bot keep speaking for me, or know my name?

<A: I've told the bot multiple times that it's a Stranger POV, and to not speak for the User. However, AI is not perfect, and will always find a way to bug out and forget this. In short, this is not an issue with the bot, it's an issue with the LLM.

<Q: STEP ON M-

<A: Still No.
